hero.heading: Gapflow and HubSpot
hero.subheading: Automate your complete inbound marketing and sales platform

documentation.title: Getting Started with HubSpot
documentation.description: Connect HubSpot to Gapflow and automate contacts, deals, marketing campaigns, and sales workflows.

documentation.title: Custom Objects & Properties
documentation.description: Work with custom objects and properties to extend HubSpot for your unique business processes.

documentation.title: Workflow Automation
documentation.description: Integrate HubSpot workflows with external systems for sophisticated cross-platform automation.

tutorials.title: Lead Scoring & Routing
tutorials.description: Build intelligent lead scoring that automatically routes qualified leads to the right sales reps.

tutorials.title: Marketing Campaign Automation
tutorials.description: Create end-to-end marketing campaigns that nurture leads from first touch to closed deal.

tutorials.title: Revenue Operations Workflow
tutorials.description: Set up RevOps automation that connects marketing, sales, and customer success seamlessly.

faqs.question: How do I connect HubSpot?
faqs.answer: Use OAuth authentication or a private app access token. OAuth is recommended for team-wide integrations with better security.

faqs.question: Can I sync custom objects?
faqs.answer: Yes! Work with any custom object in HubSpot. Create, update, and query custom objects for specialized business processes.

faqs.question: What about deal stages?
faqs.answer: Automate deal stage transitions, trigger actions when deals move stages, and keep your pipeline flowing automatically.

faqs.question: How do I handle contacts?
faqs.answer: Create contacts, update properties, add to lists, enroll in sequences, and track all engagement automatically.

faqs.question: Can I automate emails?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Send one-off emails, enroll in sequences, track opens/clicks, and trigger follow-ups based on engagement.

faqs.question: What about reporting?
faqs.answer: Pull data from HubSpot for custom reports, dashboards, and analytics in your preferred tools.

testimonials.quote: Lead routing is instant. Qualified leads reach sales reps within seconds of form submission.
testimonials.author: Jennifer Martinez

testimonials.quote: Marketing automation handles our entire funnel. Leads are nurtured perfectly from awareness to purchase.
testimonials.author: Michael Chen

testimonials.quote: Revenue operations finally unified. Marketing, sales, customer success all working from one source of truth.
testimonials.author: Sarah Thompson

testimonials.quote: Customer onboarding is seamless. Deal closes trigger entire workflow automatically.
testimonials.author: David Kumar

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: 100 requests per 10 seconds for most endpoints. Use batch endpoints and webhooks to stay within limits.

limits.title: Bulk Operations
limits.description: Batch endpoints allow up to 100 records per request. Use for efficient bulk operations on contacts and deals.

limits.title: Custom Properties
limits.description: Limits on custom properties vary by plan. Enterprise plans support more custom fields and objects.

limits.title: Workflow Complexity
limits.description: Very complex workflows may need simplification. Break into multiple workflows for better performance and maintenance.
